label: Key Metrics
description: Overview KPI strip showing P&L, exposure, margin, live strategy count, and alert count at a glance.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Removed MOCK_PORTFOLIO_DELTA + STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES imports.

0.6.note: Added Skeleton loading state guarded by coreLoading.

0.7.note: Added empty state guard when totalNav===0 and liveStrategies===0 and no alerts.

0.9.note: Removed mock-backed useHasDefiStrategies + DeFi Delta card (dead mock UI).

1.1.note: Data via useOverviewDataSafe() hook only — no inline fetch.

1.2.note: Scope reading in use-overview-page-data.ts via useGlobalScope().

1.3.note: Org filter changes strategyPerformance via getStrategiesForScope(organizationIds,...) in context producer.

1.4.note: Client filter cascades via clientIds filter in strategyPerformance useMemo.

1.5.note: Strategy filter cascades via strategyIds filter.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → getStrategiesForScope returns all strategies (unfiltered).

1.7.note: Reference data consumed only in context producer, not in widget file.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (shows 'P&L (Today)'), batch ✓ (shows 'P&L (As-Of)'), paper ✓. Title dynamically switches on context.mode.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(); widget reads context.mode for title label.

3.3.note: Human check: kpi-strip is read-only; no order entry to disable.

3.4.note: Human check: 'P&L (As-Of)' label visible in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: if context.mode === 'paper', KPICard title will show 'P&L (As-Of)' (same as batch fallback) — acceptable until paper mode fully specified.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in kpi-strip-widget.tsx. WebSocket gated in context producer.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3/3.4 require human browser walkthrough.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons in kpi-strip-widget.tsx — display-only KPI cards.

4.3.note: Human check: no form fields; display-only widget.

4.4.note: Human check: KPI values update when scope changes.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.8.note: Human check: grid wraps at narrow widths via grid-cols responsive classes.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategies that produce P&L, exposure, NAV, and alert data. kpi-strip is strategy-agnostic; aggregates across scope.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 10 tests covering 5 KPI cards, live/batch title switch, loading skeletons, empty-state, margin-used computation, alert-subtitle, null-context fallback. See tests/widgets/overview/kpi-strip.test.tsx

7.1.note: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b|rgb[a]?\(|hsl[a]?\(' → zero matches. CSS vars (var(--pnl-positive) etc.) are not hardcoded colors.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function found.

7.7.note: No useEffect or useMemo in widget. All derivations (marginUsed) are simple inline expressions from already-stable context values.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.3.note: Uses Skeleton, KPICard shared components. No raw div substitutes for interactive elements (widget is display-only).

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no interactive div without role. Human: keyboard-only walkthrough pending.

8.5.note: Human check: grid-cols-2/3/5 responsive at minW=3.

keepSeparate.rationale: kpi-strip is a compact display-only aggregation strip; merging with pnl-chart or strategy-table would lose its dedicated horizontal layout.

relationships.notes: Reads aggregated KPI data from OverviewDataContext. Scope-driven via global-scope-store.

dataContract.notes: KPI values computed from strategyPerformance + alerts aggregation in context producer. No direct API call in widget.

gaps: Margin Used computation not verified against real margin API
Alert count not verified to match alerts-preview widget

knownIssues: KPICard accentColor prop accepted in interface but not applied in component body (kpi-card.tsx) — not in widget scope

findings.description: kpi-strip-widget.tsx — had MOCK_PORTFOLIO_DELTA + STRATEGY_RISK_PROFILES imports and mock-backed useHasDefiStrategies
findings.fix: Removed mock imports and mock-backed DeFi Delta KPI card; widget now uses only context data
Added Skeleton loading state with grid layout guarded by coreLoading
Added hasData guard with 'No portfolio data available' empty state message

findings.description: kpi-strip-widget.tsx — ~4 user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
